transcript.content: The world is a near-future crisis in the Persian Gulf. Actors include Admiral Rana and Mossad Liaison. Polities include Iran, Israel, and the United States. Rules include avoid open war. Forbidden actions: nuclear first strike. Operator role is director. Public knows shipping lanes are threatened. Contested claims: who sabotaged the tanker.
